_fixture_note: Synthetic browser-oracle trace, NOT captured live. Modeled on the Blockchain.com IPO post which serves only a Next.js SPA shell to static fetches (see ../../fixtures/manifest.json :: blog-ipo-announce). The shape is what a real Playwright/Puppeteer or HAR export of that page would produce: a document request returns the shell, then the client fetches a Next.js route-data JSON payload that carries the post body. The text inside responseSnippet is a paraphrase of the public IPO announcement, used only as a marker that the distiller can match.
captureNotes: Synthetic fixture. See _fixture_note. Browser is treated as an oracle, not as truth.
